form.name: Name
form.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required for OpenAI channels
form.regionRequired: Region is required for Bedrock channels
form.keyEdit: API key (leave blank to keep current)
form.modelsPlaceholder: Type a model id and press Enter
form.modelMappingPlaceholder: Map requested model id to upstream model id
form.modelMappingServedNote: A mapped external name is automatically routable — you don't need to also add it to Models above. The external name is what clients call; the upstream id is what gets sent to this channel.
form.modelMappingEmpty: No mappings. Clients call models from the Models list as-is.
form.modelMappingCopyHint: Click a model name to copy it:
form.useInferenceProfileHelp: When on, bare Bedrock model IDs are auto-prefixed by the channel region (us./eu./apac.) to use a cross-region inference profile; already-prefixed or mapped IDs are left unchanged.

toast.copyManual: Could not copy automatically — select and copy manually.
